ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type or category of the product (e.g., clothing, outdoor gear) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the product page */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the product image */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was released */,
  "brand" TEXT /* The brand name of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* The model number of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* The color of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* The size of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* The dimensions of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* The material used to make the product */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* The warranty period for the product */,
  "return_policy" TEXT /* The return policy for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product ID */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available for sale */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The minimum quantity at which the product should be reordered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity to order when reordering the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the inventory level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sold product ID */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold in the transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale transaction */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "discount" REAL /* The discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax" REAL /* The tax amount applied to the sale */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* The cost of shipping for the sale */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* The shipping carrier used for the sale */,
  "shipping_tracking_number" TEXT /* The tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined the platform */,
  "address" TEXT /* The customer's address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* The customer's phone number */,
  "password" TEXT /* The customer's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Reference to the reviewed product ID */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Customer comments regarding the product */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the review is from a verified purchaser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding sale */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid in the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* The status of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* The transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent product type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL entry */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product ID */,
  "url_type" TEXT /* Type of URL (e.g., product page, image) */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL itself */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
